meta.source: D:\新包验证\AI-GrandHub项目\AI-GrandHub V1.1\Beta\测试记录\翻译及词条文件对比\new file\language-B1vEaFmS.js

pairsByPath.zh: 粘贴失败，面板控件不允许重叠
pairsByPath.en: Paste failed: Panel controls cannot overlap.

pairsByPath.zh: 存在已被使用的属性，删除会清除按钮相关交互，是否删除？
pairsByPath.en: Some properties are in use. Deleting them will remove associated button interactions. Continue?

pairsByPath.zh: 是否确认删除全部接口配置信息？
pairsByPath.en: Are you sure you want to delete all interface configurations?

pairsByPath.zh: 是否确认删除全部交互配置？
pairsByPath.en: Are you sure you want to delete all interaction configurations?

pairsByPath.zh: 是否确认删除全部控件?
pairsByPath.en: Are you sure you want to delete all controls?

pairsByPath.zh: 该属性已被使用，删除会清除按钮相关交互，是否删除？
pairsByPath.en: This property is in use. Deleting it will remove associated button interactions. Continue?

pairsByPath.zh: 是否确认删除该接口配置信息？
pairsByPath.en: Are you sure you want to delete this interface configuration?

pairsByPath.zh: 删除指令后需重新进行学习，是否删除？
pairsByPath.en: After deleting the instruction, you need to relearn. Do you want to delete it?

pairsByPath.zh: 是否确认删除所选元素？
pairsByPath.en: Are you sure you want to delete the selected element(s)?

pairsByPath.zh: 请从左侧资源列表拖拽模板、控件至编辑区使用
pairsByPath.en: Drag templates or controls from Resources on the left to the editing area.

pairsByPath.zh: 当前位置有重叠元素，请重新编辑
pairsByPath.en: An element already exists in this position. Please try again.

pairsByPath.zh: 未检测到中控子板，请检查板卡连接状态
pairsByPath.en: No board is detected. Please check the board connection status

pairsByPath.zh: 当前未选中按钮，选中后可设置按钮交互
pairsByPath.en: No button selected. Select one to configure interactions.

pairsByPath.zh: 当前没有指令，点击“+”创建交互指令
pairsByPath.en: No commands. Click "+" to create interaction.

pairsByPath.zh: 未配置控件，请进入编辑模式配置控件后使用
pairsByPath.en: No controls available. Enter edit mode to configure controls before use.

pairsByPath.zh: 当前无配置属性数据，请先配置接口属性。
pairsByPath.en: No properties found. Configure port properties first.

pairsByPath.zh: 当前没有红外指令点击“+”创建或导入红外指令
pairsByPath.en: No infrared commands are currently available Click "+" to create or import infrared commands

pairsByPath.zh: 点击上方添加按钮 “+” 创建
pairsByPath.en: Click the "+" button to get started.

pairsByPath.zh: 粘贴失败，面板控件没有可粘贴的区域
pairsByPath.en: Paste failed: Panel controls have no pastable area.
Do you want to enter the control mode?

pairsByPath.zh: 获取完整功能与专业技术支持服务。
pairsByPath.en: to get complete functions and professional technical support services.

pairsByPath.zh: 交互配置操作失败，请重试
pairsByPath.en: Interaction configuration failed. Please try again.
COM port data cannot be empty.

pairsByPath.zh: 控件配置未保存，是否离开？
pairsByPath.en: Are you sure you want to exit? Your changes to control configurations will be lost.

pairsByPath.zh: 加载中控数据失败，请检查网络或设备连接
pairsByPath.en: Failed to load central control data. Please check the network or device connection.

pairsByPath.zh: 检测到导入素材存在重复项！请选择
跳过重复，仅导入新素材
pairsByPath.en: Skip duplicates and import new only

pairsByPath.zh: 有 {count} 张与已有素材重复，未导入
有 {count} 张素材格式不支持（仅支持 png/jpg/jpeg/bmp）
pairsByPath.en: {count} resource(s) not supported. (Only png, jpg, jpeg, and bmp are supported.)

pairsByPath.zh: 浏览器本地存储空间不足，素材列表无法保存；当前素材仍可使用，但刷新页面后可能丢失。请删除部分素材或改用较小的图片。
pairsByPath.en: Browser storage is full; the material list could not be saved. You can still use materials in this session, but they may be lost after refresh. Remove some materials or use smaller images.

pairsByPath.zh: 该按钮未配置交互指令，请开启编辑模式配置
pairsByPath.en: No interaction is configured. Enable edit mode to set it up.

pairsByPath.zh: 当前没有可粘贴的元素，请先复制元素
pairsByPath.en: There are no elements available for pasting at the moment. Please copy an element first.

pairsByPath.zh: 当前位置超出画布，请重新粘贴
pairsByPath.en: Cannot paste elements outside the canvas. Please rearrange and try again.

pairsByPath.zh: 拖拽失败，面板控件不允许重叠
pairsByPath.en: Drag failed: Panel controls cannot overlap.

pairsByPath.zh: 清除已设置的背景图，恢复为背景颜色
pairsByPath.en: Clear the set background image and revert to background color

pairsByPath.zh: 从素材列表选择一张图片作为按钮背景图
pairsByPath.en: Select an image from the material list as the button background

pairsByPath.zh: 将默认样式同步到激活态
pairsByPath.en: Copy default style to active state
Click or drag to select images

pairsByPath.zh: body数据异常, 请求失败
串口数据指令:“{ command }”发送失败;
pairsByPath.en: Failed to send serial port command "{ command }".

pairsByPath.zh: TCP数据指令:“{ command }”发送失败;
pairsByPath.en: Failed to send TCP command "{ command }".

pairsByPath.zh: UDP数据指令:“{ command }”发送失败;
pairsByPath.en: Failed to send UDP command "{ command }".

pairsByPath.zh: 当前串口号无法打开,请检查串口占用状态重新配置
pairsByPath.en: Unable to open the serial port. Please check if it is in use and reconfigure it.

pairsByPath.zh: TCP_Client配置失败,请检查目标服务器状态
pairsByPath.en: TCP_Client configuration failed. Please check the target server status.

pairsByPath.zh: TCP_Server配置失败,请检查服务器端口占用
pairsByPath.en: TCP_Server configuration failed. Please check if the server port is in use.

pairsByPath.zh: 该名称已存在，请修改名称
pairsByPath.en: Duplicate SDK name. Please use a different name.

pairsByPath.zh: 该配置已被使用，继续删除会删除相关控件绑定，是否继续？
pairsByPath.en: This configuration is in use. Deleting it will remove associated controls. Continue?

pairsByPath.zh: 该配置属性已存在，不可重复配置
pairsByPath.en: This property already exists and cannot be configured again.

pairsByPath.zh: 您的账号已被删除，请重新登录
pairsByPath.en: Account deleted. Please try a different account.

pairsByPath.zh: 账号已停用，请联系管理员
pairsByPath.en: Account disabled. Please contact the administrator.

pairsByPath.zh: 设备已恢复备份数据，请重新登录
pairsByPath.en: Backup restored successfully. Please log in again.
Do you want to enable developer mode?

pairsByPath.zh: 试用已结束，请激活使用
pairsByPath.en: Your trial has expired. Please activate GrandHub to continue.

pairsByPath.zh: 设备已恢复出厂设置，请重新登录
pairsByPath.en: Factory reset successful. Please log in again.

pairsByPath.zh: 设备启动失败，请尝试重新启动或联系技术支持人员
pairsByPath.en: Device startup failed. Please try restarting or contact technical support.

pairsByPath.zh: 此网站不适用于Internet Explorer，建议您使用其他浏览器
pairsByPath.en: This website is not supported by Internet Explorer, please use another browser.

pairsByPath.zh: 设备已重启，请重新登录
pairsByPath.en: Session expired. Please log in again.

pairsByPath.zh: 账号已在其它地点登录，如非本人操作，请尽快修改密码
pairsByPath.en: The account has been logged in in another location, if it is not operated by yourself, please change the password as soon as possible

pairsByPath.zh: 无COM数据,请检查服务器COM口
pairsByPath.en: 无COM数据,请检查服务器COM口

pairsByPath.zh: 此设备不支持相机校对功能
pairsByPath.en: This device does not support camera calibration.

pairsByPath.zh: 您的密码已被修改，请重新登录
pairsByPath.en: Your password has been changed. Please log in again.

pairsByPath.zh: 下发 FPGA 参数失败
下发 FPGA 参数超时
交换板连接异常，请联系技术支持
pairsByPath.en: Unable to connect to the switch board. Please contact technical support.

pairsByPath.zh: 登录凭证无效，请重新登录
pairsByPath.en: Token invalid. Please log in again.

pairsByPath.zh: 服务器连接已断开，请重新连接
pairsByPath.en: The server connection has been disconnected, please reconnect

pairsByPath.zh: 设备连接已断开，请重新登录
pairsByPath.en: Device disconnection. Please log in again.
